sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61829" key="lampa/ktis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λαμπάκτῑς</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀκτίς</etym>) <sense id="n61829.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shining</tr_>, of Venus, Doroth.in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.82</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
